testsuite.name: ACOS 2.0 API Full Lifecycle (Live Provider Integration)

testcase.classname: ACOS 2.0 API Full Lifecycle (Live Provider Integration) should complete a full mission successfully using real Provider
testcase.name: ACOS 2.0 API Full Lifecycle (Live Provider Integration) should complete a full mission successfully using real Provider

testcase.classname: ACOS 2.0 API Full Lifecycle (Integration) should complete a full mission successfully without external API dependencies
testcase.name: ACOS 2.0 API Full Lifecycle (Integration) should complete a full mission successfully without external API dependencies

testcase.classname: ACOS 2.0 API Full Lifecycle (Integration) should not transition to COMPLETED before human approval and should transition to AWAITING_HUMAN_APPROVAL
testcase.name: ACOS 2.0 API Full Lifecycle (Integration) should not transition to COMPLETED before human approval and should transition to AWAITING_HUMAN_APPROVAL

testcase.classname: ACOS 2.0 API Full Lifecycle (Integration) should transition to REJECTED if human approval is rejected
testcase.name: ACOS 2.0 API Full Lifecycle (Integration) should transition to REJECTED if human approval is rejected

testcase.classname: ACOS 2.0 API Full Lifecycle (Integration) should reject duplicate approval resolution
testcase.name: ACOS 2.0 API Full Lifecycle (Integration) should reject duplicate approval resolution

testcase.classname: ACOS 2.0 API Full Lifecycle (Integration) should return undefined when resolving approval with wrong orgId or wrong requestId
testcase.name: ACOS 2.0 API Full Lifecycle (Integration) should return undefined when resolving approval with wrong orgId or wrong requestId
